title: [ImportVerilog] Cannot compile forward decleared string type
body:
I want to support this [sv-tests-results/string_concat_op](https://chipsalliance.github.io/sv-tests-results/?v=circt_verilog+11.4.12.2+string_concat_op) feature, but not sure how to fix it properly.

``` sv
module top();

string str;

initial begin
    str = "Hello";
end

endmodule
```

`circt-verilog`  has the following complaints when compiling the string.sv file:
```s.sv:3:8: error: failed to legalize operation 'moore.variable'
string str;
       ^
s.sv:3:8: note: see current operation: %0 = "moore.variable"() <{name = "str"}> : () -> !moore.ref<string>
```

This error is due to MooreToCore's lack of string-type conversion. It only has `StringConstantOpConv` and `Format*OpConversion`; none of these conversions can handle the `string` type.
code_blocks: `circt-verilog`  has the following complaints when compiling the string.sv file:
